headline.en: V4 fee temp check drove +8.71% weekly pop, but crowded longs into $4.71M thin volume above still-inflationary supply mean the rally is exhausting.
headline.zh: V4 费开关 Temp Check 推动周涨 +8.71%,但多头拥挤、成交仅 $4.71M、供给仍净通胀,反弹正在耗竭。

keyChanges.en: V4 Protocol Fee activation temp check went active on Snapshot — first governance step toward expanding the fee-switch revenue base beyond the current $43.33M annualized.
keyChanges.zh: V4 协议费开关 Temp Check 已在 Snapshot 进入活跃阶段 — 这是将 fee switch 收入基数拓宽到当前年化 $43.33M 之上的首个治理步骤。

keyChanges.en: Net emission remains +17.92M UNI/year: $7.37M annualized buyback burns only 2.08M UNI against 20M fixed emission, keeping UNI structurally inflationary at +2.01%.
keyChanges.zh: 净增发仍达 +17.92M UNI/年:年化 $7.37M 回购只能销毁 208 万 UNI,对应 2000 万固定增发,UNI 结构性通胀 +2.01%。

keyChanges.en: Positioning is crowded: L/S ratio 2.08 with funding at +0.01% and OI only $16.15M — retail bought the V4 news into a thin book that amplifies downside if the vote stalls.
keyChanges.zh: 持仓明显拥挤:多空比 2.08、funding rate +0.01%、OI 仅 $16.15M — 散户在薄盘中追 V4 消息面,若投票停滞下行波动会被放大。

contrarianObservation.en: Price sits 40% below the DAO's own $5.96 burn anchor while governance is actively expanding the fee surface (V4) and building hook revenue reporting rails (URC-3/4). A smart long argues the Real Yield RFC is 1-2 quarters away and $3.54 inside the retail capitulation zone is generational accumulation before the regime shifts to cash-flow valuation.
contrarianObservation.zh: 现价低于 DAO 自身 $5.96 销毁锚点 40%,同时治理层正主动扩大费用面 (V4) 并搭建 hook 收入报告基础设施 (URC-3/4)。聪明的多头会认为 Real Yield RFC 距离落地只有 1-2 个季度,$3.54 处于散户投降区,是估值范式切换至现金流资产前的世代性建仓价。

watchNext.en: Progression of the V4 Protocol Fee temp check to onchain vote — quorum reached and vote weight distribution reveal DAO conviction, not just delegate theater.
watchNext.zh: V4 协议费 Temp Check 是否推进至链上投票 — 参与门槛与投票权重分布反映 DAO 真实共识,而非仅代表们的表态。

watchNext.en: Whether any Real Yield / staking-buyback redirection RFC surfaces on the forum — this is the actual regime-change trigger for DCF repricing, not V4.
watchNext.zh: 论坛是否出现 Real Yield / 回购转向 staker 的 RFC 提案 — 这才是触发 DCF 重估的范式切换信号,V4 本身还不够。

watchNext.en: Volume regime: a sustained bullish break requires daily volume above $10M; current $4.71M cannot underwrite directional continuation.
watchNext.zh: 成交量结构:持续性突破需要日成交量升至 $10M 以上;当前 $4.71M 无法支撑单边延续。

fullReasoning.en: The 7d +8.71% move is a governance-driven pop off the V4 fee activation temp check going active, not organic demand — 24h volume of $4.71M against a $2.2B market cap is anemic, and +0.01% funding with a 2.08 L/S ratio tells you retail bought the news. The structural problem hasn't moved: at $3.54, the $7.37M annualized buyback burns only ~2.08M UNI against 20M emission, leaving UNI net inflationary at +2.01%/yr. Even if V4 fees double protocol revenue post-vote, the math still doesn't flip to deflation at this price. The $5.96 DAO burn anchor sits 40% above spot, which either signals mispricing or signals the market telling the DAO its self-mark was too generous. Meanwhile the Real Yield RFC — the actual regime change that would reprice UNI as a cash-flow asset — is absent from today's active proposal set; only V4 fees and hook plumbing (URC-2/3/4) are moving. Position for chop, not breakout. Above $4 without volume expansion, fade. Below $3.20, the retail-capitulation long sets up cleanly. The one-page trade today is patience: let governance clarify direction before sizing directionally, and do not chase a 2.08 L/S ratio into a $16M OI book.
fullReasoning.zh: 过去 7 天 +8.71% 的反弹是 V4 协议费开关 Temp Check 进入活跃状态所驱动的治理消息面行情,而非有机需求 — 24 小时 $4.71M 成交量对应 $2.2B 市值明显萎缩,+0.01% funding rate 配合 2.08 的多空比,清晰显示散户在追消息。结构性问题并未改善:$3.54 现价下,年化 $7.37M 回购预算只能销毁约 208 万 UNI,对应 2000 万 UNI 固定年度增发,UNI 依然处于净通胀 +2.01%/年 的状态。即便 V4 费用开关投票通过、协议收入翻倍,在当前价格下的数学仍无法翻转为通缩。DAO $5.96 的国库销毁隐含价距离现价还有 40% 溢价,这要么意味着市场错杀,要么意味着市场在告诉 DAO 其自我定价过于乐观。同时,真正能把 UNI 重估为现金流资产的 Real Yield RFC 提案,在今天的活跃议案中并不存在,只有 V4 费用与 hook 基础设施 (URC-2/3/4) 在推进。做震荡不做突破。$4 上方若成交量未跟上则做空,$3.20 下方则布局散户投降 long。当前一页决策是等待 — 让治理明朗后再定方向,不要在 $16M OI 的薄盘里追 2.08 的多空比。
